commands.cmd: read-only ten-chart requirement, data, privacy, accessibility and performance map

summary: Mapped all ten chart families and selected server-owned calorie, macro and semantic nutrient-coverage panels as the smallest high-value first package.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Scout exceeded the single-wait limit and was interrupted; the PM completed the same read-only map as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: A Judge must approve the exact first chart formulas and accessible rendering boundary.
Longer-range, source, completeness and weight charts need later data services/preferences.
